name: nginx-multisite
description: Manages Nginx web server with multi-site virtual host management, per-site SSL/TLS using self-signed certificates, HTTP-to-HTTPS redirects, security header injection, gzip compression, and a full security hardening layer covering UFW firewall rules, fail2ban intrusion prevention, SSH daemon hardening, and kernel-level sysctl network security tuning.

name: cache
description: Installs and configures both Memcached and Redis caching services with password authentication enabled, including a post-install ruby_block workaround that strips deprecated Redis configuration directives to ensure compatibility with newer Redis versions.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: Deploys a full-stack Python FastAPI web application by cloning the app from GitHub, creating a Python virtual environment, installing pip dependencies, provisioning a PostgreSQL database and user, writing a .env configuration file, and managing a systemd service unit running on port 8000.
